articles.title: Genco Shipping CEO | Dry Bulk Sees Best Quarter Since 2022

(Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Saudi source denies report on Trump U-turn over Hormuz operation
articles.summary: Saudi source denies report on Trump U-turn over Hormuz operation A Saudi source has rejected a US media report saying President Donald Trump announced a pause in an American military operation to guide stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz following an intervention by Riyadh. According to a report from US network NBC News, Trump's U-turn came after Saudi Arabia - whose Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman reportedly talked directly to Trump - refused to allow US forces to use its airspace and bases for the Hormuz operation. "This isn't true," a source close to the Saudi government told AFP.

articles.summary: UAE to document Iran attacks to support legal bid The UAE will form a committee to document Iran's attacks to support legal action, state media said on Thursday, after earlier calling for reparations. The UAE bore the brunt of the attacks, having been targeted by more than 2,800 drones and missiles from the neighbouring country. articles.title: Private Equity Faces Profit Timing Gap
articles.summary: Bloomberg's Allison McNeely discusses Carlyle Group's recent earnings miss, highlighting a roughly 1% stock decline despite strong asset sales and realizations. McNeely notes similar commentary from KKR executives, who also reported earnings and indicated improving asset sale pipelines. Additionally, BlackRock has continued to mark down legacy private debt funds, such as TCP, signaling potential for further markdowns in the private credit space. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
